shape.started_at: ISO-8601|null (server timestamp set when triggered flipped to true)

easterEggField.writer: section-4 dealHand Cloud Function (writes triggered=true synchronously during the deal that produces 2-7o for any seat; sets a follow-up scheduled function to flip triggered=false after duration_ms)
easterEggField.reader: section-6 client via the same handDocument onSnapshot listener section-5 uses

isTwoSevenOff(holeCards).notes: Server-side detection. Returns true iff the two cards are 2 and 7 with different suits. Used by dealHand.

notes: section-6 only consumes easter_egg.triggered + started_at + duration_ms; never decides locally whether the trigger applies. The kind field is forward-extensible to other easter eggs but only 'two-seven-off' is implemented at launch.
